Apple___Apple_scab.description: A fungal disease causing dark, olive-green to black spots on leaves and fruit.
Apple___Apple_scab.symptoms:
• Velvety spots on leaves
• Cracked fruit
• Yellowing leaves
Apple___Apple_scab.prevention:
• Remove fallen leaves
• Prune for airflow
• Plant resistant varieties
Apple___Apple_scab.treatment: Apply fungicides like Captan or Mancozeb during the growing season.

Corn___Common_rust.description: A fungal disease that thrives in high humidity and cool temperatures.
Corn___Common_rust.symptoms:
• Small, cinnamon-brown pustules
• Leaf yellowing
• Premature leaf death
Corn___Common_rust.prevention:
• Use rust-resistant hybrids
• Early planting
• Crop rotation
Corn___Common_rust.treatment: Foliar fungicides like Pyraclostrobin if infection is severe.

Potato___Early_blight.description: Common fungal disease affecting older leaves first, reducing tuber yield.
Potato___Early_blight.symptoms:
• Concentric rings (target spots)
• Yellow halo around spots
• Stem lesions
Potato___Early_blight.prevention:
• Crop rotation
• Space plants well
• Avoid overhead irrigation
Potato___Early_blight.treatment: Use fungicides containing chlorothalonil or copper-based sprays.

Potato___Late_blight.description: A destructive disease that causes rapid rotting of leaves and tubers.
Potato___Late_blight.symptoms:
• Dark water-soaked spots
• White mold on leaf undersides
• Foul smell from rotting tissue
Potato___Late_blight.prevention:
• Use certified seeds
• Destroy infected plants
• Avoid wet conditions
Potato___Late_blight.treatment: Immediate spray of Metalaxyl or Mancozeb fungicides.

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.description: A bacterial disease causing small, dark, raised spots on leaves and fruit.
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.symptoms:
• Small black spots with yellow halos
• Leaf drop
• Scabby fruit spots
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.prevention:
• Use pathogen-free seeds
• Avoid overhead watering
• Clean garden tools
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.treatment: Copper-based bactericides can help limit spread.

Tomato___Early_blight.description: Fungal disease causing target-like spots on lower leaves.
Tomato___Early_blight.symptoms:
• Concentric ring spots
• Yellowing of lower leaves
• Stem cankers

healthy.description: The crop appears healthy with no visible signs of disease.
healthy.symptoms:
• Vibrant green leaves
• Strong stems
• Regular growth pattern
healthy.prevention:
• Regular monitoring
• Balanced fertilization
• Proper watering
healthy.treatment: Continue regular maintenance and preventive care.
